reviews.review_description:
Sugar Madness is a deliciously chaotic VR shooter where you battle waves of candy-themed enemies in a colorful, sugar-fueled world. With two main modes—static endurance waves and on-rails action—plus fun mini-games at the end of each level, this sequel to Sugar Rush delivers big on fun and challenge.
Upgrade your arsenal, unlock new skills, and dive into fluid, well-executed gameplay that’s as satisfying as it is sweet. The mini-games add that extra punch of excitement, making every level a treat. If you love fast-paced, visually stunning shooters, this is a must-play for your VR library. 10/10—would shoot candy again! 🍬🎮

developer_response.body:
Wow, our very first review is here! 
Huge thanks for this amazing write-up.

reviews.review_description:
A worthy follow-up to "Sugar Mess" (the predecessor to this game)

A game that's fun for all the family no matter your age; with its bright visuals and jaunty music that's fitting for the game.

It takes what made "Sugar Mess" — a mixture of stationary/on the rails wave shooter with boss battles and mini-games thrown in.
But then it improves on it in practically every way possible! Both in terms of content and gameplay.
There are even more mini-games added to the mix and added mechanics to the core game (now you can switch between fire/ice guns which do extra damage to the opposite enemy type — someone a fan of Ikaruga on the team?)

But the biggest news is now the inclusion of multiplayer.
You can now play through the game with a friend!
The challenges will keep you coming back for more as you level up your arsenal of weapons.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the fantastic review!

We're so glad you enjoyed the mix of action, mini-games, co-op play, progression, and that the overall experience kept you engaged throughout. Nice note about Ikaruga, that’s a classic inspiration we appreciate too 😉

reviews.review_description: Sugar Madness is a fast, funny and surprisingly addictive VR shooter. The candy-themed weapons, chaotic enemies and arcade pacing make every level feel energetic and unique. A very fun co-op friendly VR experience with tons of personality and pure arcade chaos.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your feedback! Hope you continue having a blast playing!

reviews.review_description:
JollyCo do it again, another fantastic family friendly fun arcade game.
This has all the traits of what VR was made for.
An on rail shooter that exudes chaotic super crazy fun.
The whole game is so polished, easily the best game from JollyCo. 
This is a step up from previous games, as good as they were this is just brilliant stuff.
Problem is once you go in you can’t stop, it’s that
 “Just one more go” feel to the game .
This game is highly recommended for young and old, absolutely loving my time in Sugar Madness, dive in now.

developer_response.body: This made our day 😄 “just one more go” is exactly what we were going for. Thanks a lot for the love and support, so happy you’re enjoying Sugar Madness!

reviews.review_description: Sugar Madness is a fun and addictive game, The graphics are bright and cheerful, with engaging gameplay, and with lots satisfying challenges   its easy to lose track of time while playing. There are plenty of different challenges to keep it fresh. All in all a good game for the library

developer_response.body: Really appreciate this! We love hearing that it stayed fun, engaging, and easy to sink. Thanks for playing Sugar Madness!

reviews.review_description:
I just began playing Sugar Madness, after having previously played Sugar Mess: Let's Play Jolly Battle and Jolly Match from JollyCo.  I find its graphics to be colorful and interesting, and its music to be addictive and playful.

It's a great improvement to Sugar Mess in many ways.  I love the easy reload by pressing the "A" button, using the shield for protection, being able to dodge incoming, and knowing your health level is very helpful.  You can easily change shooting elements with a horizontal movement of the joystick.

It's amazing that it now has functionality to play multiplayer with a friend, join a room, or quick match because I enjoy playing with friends although I have not tried that yet.

It's great to battle all the new types of CandyMorphs, and I find this game to be very challenging and fun!  It also has mini games after each level, and the first one was really fun and challenging.

I strongly recommend Sugar Madness as a fast-paced colorful candy shooter for all age groups (I'm 64 1/2).  You'll find yourself completely immersed in its colorful world.  I can't wait to play more levels and discover all of the surprises that Sugar Madness has to offer!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the detailed feedback. We’re glad you’re enjoying the visuals, gameplay, and mini-games. Great to hear the mechanics and difficulty are working well for you.

For multiplayer, you can also find co-op partners on our Discord if you want to try it out with others - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_description: This game is a blast! I'm a midcore player and shooting down these fun enemies and fighting bosses is what I really like and expected from the game! The weapon controls feel smooth to use, and the general vibe just keeps you coming back for more. Can't wait to play co-op!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for your feedback. If you're looking for co-op, you can connect with other players on our Discord - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_title: Such a fun game, even better in co-op!
reviews.review_description:
No overcomplicated mechanics, just pure, goofy, fast-paced shooting. Blasting evil candy with a gumball shotgun is way more satisfying than it has any right to be!

And don't even get me started on the mini-games. They are all so fun! It really gives an extra twist to the rail-shooter subgenre.

Co-op is a blast with friends. Tracking feels super sharp, and the weapons are hilarious! Easily 5 stars. :D

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description:
I love games with fantasy worlds, and this one just pulls me in with its vibe.

The progression feels really good, and the difficulty hits a sweet spot for me, not so hard that I get stuck and want to quit, but not so easy that I’m done with it too fast.

My favorite mini-game so far is definitely the one where you smash candy with a hammer. I’d love to try the co-op mode too, but I don’t have anyone to play with right now.

developer_response.body:
Really glad you’re enjoying the fantasy vibe and progression. That hammer mini-game is a favorite for us too.

Also, if you’re looking for a co-op teammate, you can now find partners on our Discord in a dedicated channel - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_description:
I bought this to play co-op with a casual player. We thought it might be like playing a silly version of the PSVR1 classic Rush of Blood together. We both love that game.

This is far, far more difficult than Rush of Blood. It's more frustrating than fun.  Switching between the bat and pistol, reloading, and changing shot types all the while being swamped with targets gets pretty maddening. This game starts out around the difficulty of the levels near the end of Rush of Blood.

When turning corners on the train levels the frame rate hitches which makes me a bit queasy after a while.

The graphics are nice though.

I have to request a refund.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're sorry to hear that the difficulty level and gameplay mechanics didn't match the experience you were hoping for, especially when playing co-op with a casual player.

We understand that managing weapon switching, reloading, ammo types, and large numbers of enemies at the same time can feel overwhelming at first. The game does have a learning curve, and many players find that the controls and combat become much more intuitive as they spend more time with the different weapons and mechanics.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the performance issues you experienced on the train levels. Your feedback has been noted and shared with the team for review.

We're glad to hear you enjoyed the visual style of the game, and we truly appreciate you giving Sugar Madness a try.

reviews.review_description: This game is everything you'd expect and more.  I received a copy for testing, and I'd easily have bought it at full price.  It has wave shooters of enemies coming at you, on-rails shooter, really fun and varied minigames, and interesting boss battles.  I'm having a blast with everything this game has to offer and it's the kind of fun you can only have in VR.  The bubble popping minigame was the highlight for me.  It's such a great showcase of what you can do in VR.  I haven't tried the co-op yet, but I bet it's a ton of fun.  This game is great for any age, as well, and I always like when I can play seated since I have bad feet.  It's such an easy recommendation.  This game's great.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and sharing your feedback. We’re glad you’re enjoying the variety and seated-friendly options. If you want to try co-op, you can find other players on Discord - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_description:
First off, don’t let the cutesy vibes fool ya… this game is much tougher than it looks. The mechanics all work nicely, though I do have trouble switching between primary and secondary weapons. Most times the button doesn’t register the first couple times when trying to switch.  Other than that, the controls/mechanics work great. Also love the main lobby area.  And finally, I lice the replayability… each lvl has 3 goals, each unlocking after completing the previous. Gives me a reason to replay levels multiple times. 

BUT I do have 1 negative, and it’s kinda important… MORE GUNS!  From the looks of it, there’s only 3 primary weapons, and none of em are very creative. Choose from a regular pistol, a SMG pistol, and a shotgun. Yes, there’s 3 upgrade lvls for each weapon, but it doesn’t change the fact there’s only 3 guns to choose from.  I was expecting at least 8-10 choices. This game has so much potential but I feel like the lack of weapons is gonna is gonna make the game feel stale the more I play. Seriously though, offering only 3 weapons is kinda lazy imho. Especially since all 3 are staples in literally every shooter ever created.  Please devs, add more weapons!  

Otherwise, this game is real solid and I highly recommend. $15 (I used a 20% off code so it was actually $12) feels like the perfect price. If more guns were added then I’d pay $25 easy.  Again, don’t let the theme fool ya… If you’ve played Rouge Piñatas you know not to judge a book by its cover.  This game is a LOT like piñatas

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the detailed review! Glad you’re enjoying the challenge, replayability, and the lobby area.

We’ve noted your feedback on the weapon switching and the current weapon variety. Appreciate you taking the time to share it.

reviews.review_description:
This game goes really hard. gunplay is crisp, mobs are creepy as hell, and the bosses are elite. 

P.S. Still hardstuck on biome 3 tho 💀

developer_response.body: Biome 3 hits different, glad you’re enjoying the gunplay and bosses though. You’ll break through soon, keep going!

reviews.review_description: It's a great game. You can play online with good friends. I hope I can speak Chinese.

developer_response.body: We’re currently working on adding more language options, and Chinese will be included very soon. Stay tuned for updates, we’ll share the news as soon as it’s ready. You’re also welcome to join our Discord to follow the latest announcements and updates - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_description: This has to be the worst vr game ever dont buy this ai slop this dumb clanker game is sucks and thats why im telling you to not buy this game the characters are creepy and weird

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts. Our team put a lot of work into Sugar Madness, and our artists carefully crafted each character to give the world its own unique personality and style. While the game's look and vibe may not resonate with everyone, we hope that one day you'll have a chance to try it in co-op with a friend or family member, as many players find that the shared experience brings a whole different kind of fun.

reviews.review_description: I highly recommend this game, its really fun, had a great time playing it.

It is exactly the kind of non-realistic shooter I was looking for.
The game has a horror-like feel, but it’s never too scary. The music deserves special mention, it constantly builds tension and keeps that eerie feeling going while you play which I really love.
The shooting is satisfying. The controls are easy to get used to. Sometimes I feel like my reactions are a bit slow, but I’m still learning the rhythm of the game, especially when switching quickly between the cold and hot weapon modes. The boss levels definitely got me sweating but in a good way.
And I absolutely love the bat and the hammer. Smashing those creatures is just super fun.

Sugar Madness is a fun, colorful family-friendly VR experience. I love it that all the levels feel very different, with mini games and a crazy story. The difficulty level is perfect: It is challenging enough to be interesting for seasonaed players, but it isnt too overwhelming for VR noobs. The game isnt violent in any way so it is family friendly imo. For me a clear recommendation.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the game. Glad you’re enjoying the variety, balance, and family-friendly design. We appreciate the recommendation.

reviews.review_title: A Sweet Treat of a Game!
reviews.review_description:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

This is pure sugary chaos in the best possible way! The colourful visuals, fun gameplay, and addictive mechanics make it incredibly easy to lose track of time as you chase high scores and conquer increasingly challenging levels.

The controls are intuitive, the pace is just right, and there's plenty of variety to keep things fresh. Great for a quick gaming session or something to keep you entertained for longer, this game delivers plenty of fun with a smile.

If you're after a light-hearted VR experience that's bursting with charm and packed with replay value this is it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! We're really glad the game brought a smile to your face. Appreciate you playing and sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Even if you're a boring adult, this game will win you over with its cute atmosphere and its goofy, cartoonish sounds. The mini-games are really cool too; it would be interesting to have a mode just to play them, haha! Fun is guaranteed for the whole family. 10/10.

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoyed the experience, and we appreciate the suggestion about the mini-games. Thanks for playing and for taking the time to share your thoughts!
